    populateGenreListDisplayPanel() - Static method in class ui.gui.GenreGUI
    Populates the genre list display panel with genres from the database.
    populateLivreListDisplayPanel() - Static method in class ui.gui.LivreGUI
    Populates the livre list display panel with book entries.
    populateLoanListDisplayPanel() - Static method in class ui.gui.PretGUI
    Populates the loan list display panel with the current list of loans.
    populateUserListDisplayPanel() - Static method in class ui.gui.UsagerGUI
    Populates the user list display panel with user data from the database.
    Pret - Class in models
    This class represents a loan in the database.
    Pret(int, Date, int, LocalDate, Livre, Usager) - Constructor for class models.Pret
    Constructor to create a Loan object with the specified ID, date of borrowing, duration of the loan, effective return date, book, and user.
    PretAddForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.pret
    This class represents a form for adding a new loan (Pret).
    PretAddForm() - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.pret.PretAddForm
    Constructor for the PretAddForm.
    PretDAO - Class in dao.controllers
    This class is used to manage loans in the database.
    PretDAO() - Constructor for class dao.controllers.PretDAO
    Constructor for PretDAO.
    PretDeleteForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.pret
    This class represents a form for confirming the deletion of a loan (Pret).
    PretDeleteForm(Pret) - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.pret.PretDeleteForm
    Constructor for the PretDeleteForm.
    PretForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.pret
    This abstract class serves as a base for loan-related forms in the application.
    PretForm(String, String) - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.pret.PretForm
    Constructor for the PretForm.
    PretGUI - Class in ui.gui
    This class represents the GUI for managing loans (Pret).
    PretGUI() - Constructor for class ui.gui.PretGUI
    Constructor for the PretGUI.
    PretModifyForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.pret
    This class represents a form for modifying an existing loan.
    PretModifyForm(Pret) - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.pret.PretModifyForm
    Constructor for the PretModifyForm.
    PretView - Class in ui.gui.views
    This class represents a view for displaying the details of a loan.
    PretView(Pret) - Constructor for class ui.gui.views.PretView
    Constructor for PretView.
